items.name: animated-form
items.title: Animated Form
items.description: Animated form mimicking account creation with progressive name/password animation and completion checkmarks.

items.name: animated-tabs
items.title: Animated Tabs
items.description: witch tabs smoothly with motion-based underline or highlight effects.

items.name: animated-otp
items.title: Animated OTP
items.description: Looping animated OTP input with glowing digit transitions to simulate secure, timed authentication flow.

items.name: bot-detection
items.title: Bot Detection
items.description: Animated radar-style component that simulates real-time bot detection using glowing pulses and scanning motion.

items.name: expandable-card
items.title: Expandable Card
items.description: Interactive UI component to expand cards with smooth animations and detailed content using layout transitions.

items.name: framework-agnostic
items.title: Framework Agnostic
items.description: Visually demonstrates cross-framework adaptability using animated stack icons and a glowing pipeline effect.

items.name: fraud-card
items.title: Fraud Card
items.description: A security alert card inspired by Clerk's landing page, showcasing blocked emails with smooth hover animations.

items.name: notification-center
items.title: Notification Center
items.description: Beautifully animated mobile UI showcasing notifications with hover-triggered transitions and customizable content blocks.

items.name: notification-panel
items.title: Notification Panel
items.description: A collapsible notification panel displaying recent alerts with icons, timestamps, and smooth animated transitions.

items.name: onboard-card
items.title: Onboard Card
items.description: Animated onboarding progress card showing three steps with visual loaders, transitions, and completion indicators.

items.name: security-card
items.title: Security Card
items.description: Dynamic security identity card with animated verification, glowing avatar outline, and infinite character scramble stream.

items.name: social-card
items.title: Social Card
items.description: An animated profile card showing name, avatar, and social links on hover.

items.name: stats-card
items.title: Stats Card
items.description: A dynamic stats card comparing two individuals with avatars, data points, and animated background graph.

items.name: spectrum-switcher
items.title: Spectrum Switcher
items.description: Interactive spectrum switcher with animated gradients, smooth dropdown transitions, and selectable themed color palettes.

items.name: text-reveal
items.title: Text Reveal
items.description: A stylish effect that sequentially fades in text on page load, creating a dynamic reveal.

items.name: text-morph
items.title: Text Morph
items.description: A React component that animates rotating text characters using Motion, customizable by words, interval, styling, and animation timing.

items.name: text-shimmer
items.title: Text Shimmer
items.description: A React component that creates an animated text shimmer effect using Motion, customizable by tag, duration, spread, delay, and repeat delay.

items.name: stack-ripple
items.title: Stack Ripple
items.description: Animated stacked notification cards ripple open with smooth transitions, showing messages, signups, and billing reminders.

items.name: vault-lock
items.title: Vault Lock
items.description: Animated vault showcasing secure password input with motion effects and interactive hover-based unlock behavior.

items.name: cloudscape
items.title: Cloudscape
items.description: A WebGL-powered animated cloud gradient that creates a soft, flowing sky-like background using layered noise and color blending.

items.name: lumadrift
items.title: Lumadrift
items.description: A WebGL-powered animated gradient that produces smooth, flowing light patterns using procedural noise and color blending.

items.name: cosmicrift
items.title: Cosmicrift
items.description: A WebGL-powered animated cosmic background featuring a procedural starfield with twinkling effects and flowing nebula-like wave distortions, rendered in real time using shaders.

items.name: chromatic-fluid
items.title: Chromatic Fluid
items.description: A WebGL-powered animated fluid effect featuring procedural noise, chromatic glint highlights, and dynamic lighting with film grain.

items.name: velora
items.title: Velora
items.description: A WebGL-powered animated radial light effect featuring swirling color streaks, 3D noise-based flow, and dynamic color transitions with film grain.

items.name: velaris
items.title: Velaris
items.description: A WebGL-powered animated background featuring layered simplex noise, multi-color blending, vignette glow, and subtle film grain effects.

items.name: auralis
items.title: Auralis
items.description: A WebGL-powered animated background featuring layered simplex noise, glowing light effects, vignette, and subtle film grain for a dramatic ambiance.

items.name: nebulore
items.title: Nebulore
items.description: A WebGL-powered animated nebula background featuring flowing aurora ribbons, domain-warped simplex noise, and customizable color glow with film grain.

items.name: noctylis
items.title: Noctylis
items.description: A WebGL-powered nocturnal glow background featuring chained simplex noise layers, soft violet light blooms, vignette, and film grain.
